steps.title: Use the conclusion
steps.content: The text explains that balance affects how viewers perceive a photograph: symmetry, asymmetry, and radial balance each shape emphasis differently. The conclusion says what a photograph conveys is therefore largely blank how it is balanced.

steps.title: Match the dependence
steps.content: A means reserved for, B means held back by, and D means obligated to; none fits the cause-effect relationship. The needed phrase means dependent on, because the photograph's meaning depends on its balance. The answer is C.
